<!-- vela-merged-guide -->
## ✅ Merged — this build is now on `main`

The QR in the bot comment above points to the **`main`** EAS branch — the code from this PR **as it landed on main**, not the temporary `pr-<number>` preview (that one is retired now that the PR is closed).

- Open the **Vela Wallet dev build** on your phone and scan the **Update QR** above (iPhone → iOS column, Android → Android column).
- It's the same scan-to-load flow as the PR preview — no reinstall unless the **Runtime version** in the bot comment changed (native code changed).
- This is the canonical "latest main" build: scan it any time to get the current merged state.

See the tester guide on any open PR for one-time setup and troubleshooting.
